title: odontarrhena pateri subsp. prostrata
intro: Odontarrhena pateri subsp. prostrata is a rare and endemic subspecies of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil for medicinal use.
